problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Combining Perovskite crystal structure optimization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
